calendar.matters:
To Terminate Estate
Off Calendar Oct-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Ferdon appearing for Public Guardian. Issues addressed. Court is granting the petition. Counsel will prepare the order. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-01-2006 Continued To Aug-15-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2006 Continued To Aug-01-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Ferdon appearing for petitioner. They still don't know if there is anything in this estate. The Edward Marenco Jr. trust is continued to 8/1. This matter is continued to 8/1 also. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-10-2006 Continued To Jun-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JONATHAN FERDON FOR THE SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC GUARDIAN; MICHAEL FREEDMAN FOR TRUSTEE; BRIAN CONNERS FOR JANET PLANELLS; JOHN MANGINI FOR HOWARD COLLINS. THIS MATTER IS HEARD WITH LINE 40 CASE #288377. THE PARTIES PRESENT ARGUMENT. THE COURT IS INFORMED THAT THERE IS A RELATED PROBATE MATTER PENDING IN SANTA CLARA COUNTY. THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO JUNE 5, 2006 FOR STATUS ON THE SANTA CLARA COUNTY MATTER.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-21-2006 Continued To Apr-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Ferdon appearing for Public Administrator. John Mangini appearing for Howard Collins, petitioner in the Ed Marenco Trust. Audrey Collins, proposed successor trustee is in court. Tam Ravinhill, trustee is also in court. Ms. Ravinhill's counsel is retired. His law office is still in business. She wants a continuance to review the petition.Matter is continued to 4/10. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teanna L. Ward CSR#11918. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-01-2006 Continued To Mar-21-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Brian Connors appearing for Janet Plannels. Roger Meredith appearing for Audrey Collins. Counsel for the Public Administrator is not in court. Mr. Conners reported to the court that a petition to appoint successor trustee in the Ed Marenco Trust has been filed. Hearing date is set on 3/21. Mr. Meredith requested to have this matter taken off calendar since a petition has been filed in the Ed Marenco Trust. Court is not taking this matter off calendar since counsel for the Public Administrator is not in court. Matter is continued to 3/21, Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
